implemented.description: Available through the public CLI with a stable JSON contract.

preview.description: Available only with --preview and emits a non-stable warning on success.

planned.description: Declared as a target command only; execution fails closed with CAPABILITY_UNAVAILABLE.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Discover the implemented, preview, and planned public command surface.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show release, initialization, connection, Cloud enrollment, and bridge readiness.

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Run read-only local runtime and installation checks.

commands.name: setup status|open
commands.description: Inspect the versioned Setup Center readiness contract or open the authenticated loopback setup page.

commands.name: capabilities list|inspect
commands.description: Discover registered capabilities or inspect one capability.

commands.name: chat list|start|show|send|cancel
commands.description: Manage local Agent conversations through the unified CLI.

commands.name: skill list|inspect|verify
commands.description: Discover installed skills, inspect metadata, and run registered skill verification.

commands.name: channel list|status|connect|disconnect
commands.description: Manage conversation channel lifecycle through the unified CLI.

commands.name: managed-platform list|inspect
commands.description: Discover managed-platform capabilities and constraints.

commands.name: managed-account list|connect|status|pause|disconnect
commands.description: Manage local credentials and lifecycle for managed accounts.

commands.name: managed-task list|show|plan|approve|execute|cancel
commands.description: Plan, approve, execute, and audit managed-platform tasks.

commands.name: extension list|inspect
commands.description: List installed extensions or inspect one installed extension.

commands.name: extension install|enable|disable|remove|verify
commands.description: Mutate and verify extension lifecycle through the unified CLI.

commands.name: content list|inspect|build|preview|publish|unpublish
commands.description: Build, preview, publish, and unpublish local content.

commands.name: file list|inspect|import|export|remove
commands.description: Manage private and materialized files through the unified CLI.

commands.name: automation list|inspect|create|enable|disable|run|remove
commands.description: Manage local automation definitions and runs.

commands.name: model list|status|set|verify
commands.description: Inspect and configure local model providers.

commands.name: connection status
commands.description: Show the canonical connection mode and redacted provider readiness.

commands.name: connection set|verify
commands.description: Declare or verify local-only, managed-cloud, or self-hosted-edge connectivity.

commands.name: cloud connect
commands.description: Authorize an optional managed Cloud connection through browser-based device authorization.

commands.name: cloud login
commands.description: Use purpose-bound browser authorization to obtain a short-lived resource token and bind redacted Cloud resources locally.

commands.name: cloud resources
commands.description: Refresh and show the redacted public domain, Agent mail identity, and managed-service readiness from the stored CLI session.

commands.name: cloud status
commands.description: Show redacted optional managed Cloud enrollment state.

commands.name: cloud disconnect
commands.description: Disconnect an optional managed Cloud connection without deleting local data.

commands.name: edge plan|apply|status|verify|rollback
commands.description: Plan, apply, verify, and roll back a self-hosted Edge transport.

commands.name: backup status
commands.description: Show the local backup policy and most recent scheduler state.

commands.name: mail status
commands.description: Show redacted local MTA pipe, ingress shim, archive, and authenticated Web readiness.

commands.name: mail plan
commands.description: Describe the non-mutating local MTA pipe contract without bundling or configuring an SMTP server.

commands.name: backup create|verify|restore-plan|restore-apply
commands.description: Create, verify, plan, or apply encrypted backup recovery through the unified CLI.

commands.name: update check|plan|apply|rollback
commands.description: Check, plan, apply, or roll back immutable Node releases.

commands.name: audit list|show
commands.description: Read redacted local audit records through the unified CLI.

commands.name: operation list|show
commands.description: List or inspect local two-stage operation records through the control service.

commands.name: operation approve
commands.description: Approve a current operation digest from an interactive local TTY.

commands.name: operation execute
commands.description: Execute an approved operation through the unified CLI.
